title: Wild weather unleashes thunderstorms across south-east Australia, triggering flash flooding
summary_full: Wet weather batters parts of Queensland, NSW and Tasmania amid warnings of heavy falls on FridayGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastWild weather more typical of summer than the last days of autumn has caused chaos in south-eastern Australia, unleashing a string of severe thunderstorms.Heavy rainfall accompanied by 500,000 lightning strikes across Queensland and New South Wales triggered widespread flash flooding, road closures and travel disruptions. Continue reading...
